productName: Stingers - 2pk .5g Liquid Diamonds Pre-Rolls - Memory Loss - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark sativa infused pre-roll of Memory Loss, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of ammonia, pepper, and woody, with an active, daytime spark. A little goes a long way.
